The core Pclika bridge device. CP2102N USB-to-UART converter with galvanic isolation and ESD protection. Ships with bridge firmware pre-flashed. Plug into any USB port and run pclika-bridge to expose tools to AI clients.

## Hardware Specifications

  - **Chip**: CP2102N + Si8621 isolator
  - **Voltage**: USB 5V, 3.3V output
  - **Protocol**: UART (up to 3 Mbps)
  - **Pins**: TX, RX, RTS, CTS, 3.3V, GND
  - **Dimensions**: 48 x 22 x 9 mm
  - **Weight**: 8 g
